name: WebProbe Authentication Manager
description: Auth context management: cookie/bearer/header injection and auth detection. Manages authentication injection for both aiohttp sessions (Phase 1 crawling) and Playwright browser contexts (Phase 2 capture), with auth redirect detection and auth indicator validation.

types.name: AuthManager
types.description: Manages authentication injection for both aiohttp and Playwright. Supports cookie, bearer token, and custom header auth methods.

functions.name: __init__

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Authentication configuration containing method (none/cookie/bearer/header) and associated credentials

postconditions: self.config is set to the provided config object
side_effects: Stores config reference in instance state

functions.name: has_auth
functions.description: Property that returns whether authentication is configured. Returns True if method is not 'none'.
postconditions: Returns True if config.method != 'none', False otherwise

functions.name: apply_to_session
functions.description: Inject auth into an aiohttp session for Phase 1 crawling. Mutates session by adding cookies or headers based on configured auth method.

inputs.name: session
inputs.description: aiohttp session to inject authentication into

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: If config attributes (cookie_name, bearer_token, etc.) are missing for the specified method

preconditions: session is a valid aiohttp.ClientSession instance
If method='cookie': config.cookie_name and config.cookie_value are set
If method='header': config.header_name and config.header_value are set
postconditions: If method='cookie': session.cookie_jar contains the specified cookie
If method='bearer': session.headers contains Authorization header with Bearer token
If method='header': session.headers contains custom header with specified value
side_effects: Mutates session.headers if method is 'bearer' or 'header'

structured_side_effects.description: Injects authentication credentials into aiohttp session

functions.name: apply_to_context
functions.description: Inject auth into a Playwright browser context for Phase 2 capture. Adds cookies or sets extra HTTP headers based on configured auth method.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Playwright browser context to inject authentication into

inputs.name: base_url
inputs.description: Base URL for determining cookie domain

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: If config attributes are missing for the specified method

error_cases.name: ValueError
error_cases.condition: If base_url cannot be parsed by urlparse

preconditions: context is a valid Playwright BrowserContext instance
base_url is a valid URL string
If method='cookie': config.cookie_name and config.cookie_value are set
If method='header': config.header_name and config.header_value are set
postconditions: If method='cookie': context has cookie added with parsed domain from base_url, path='/'
If method='bearer': context extra HTTP headers include Authorization with Bearer token
If method='header': context extra HTTP headers include custom header
side_effects: Awaits context.set_extra_http_headers() if method is 'bearer' or 'header'

structured_side_effects.target: context cookies or extra HTTP headers
structured_side_effects.description: Injects authentication credentials into Playwright browser context

functions.name: is_auth_redirect
functions.description: Detect if a response redirected to the login page by comparing original and final URL paths against configured login_url.

error_cases.name: ValueError
error_cases.condition: If original_url or final_url cannot be parsed by urlparse

preconditions: original_url and final_url are valid URL strings
postconditions: Returns False if config.login_url is not set
Returns True if final_url path matches login_url path (trailing slashes stripped) AND final path differs from original path

functions.name: check_auth_indicator
functions.description: Check if the auth_indicator selector is present on the page. Returns True if the selector is found, False otherwise or on any exception.

error_cases.name: Exception
error_cases.condition: Any exception during page.query_selector() is caught and returns False

preconditions: page is a valid Playwright Page instance
postconditions: Returns False if config.auth_indicator is not set
Returns True if element matching auth_indicator selector is found
Returns False if element is not found or any exception occurs
side_effects: Awaits page.query_selector() which may perform DOM query

invariants: AuthManager always maintains a reference to its AuthConfig
Auth method must be one of: 'none', 'cookie', 'bearer', 'header'
Cookie injection sets path='/' for Playwright contexts
Bearer token is always prefixed with 'Bearer ' in Authorization header
All exceptions in check_auth_indicator are caught and return False
URL path comparison for auth redirect uses rstrip('/') for normalization

data_access.rationale: Module manages authentication state and modifies session/context objects but does not directly read/write persistent data stores

side_effects.rationale: Injects authentication credentials into aiohttp sessions and Playwright browser contexts for authenticated crawling
Queries page DOM to check for authentication indicator element presence

authority.rationale: AuthManager is the authoritative component for managing authentication credentials and detecting auth redirects in webprobe. It owns the logic for injecting cookies, bearer tokens, and custom headers into both aiohttp and Playwright contexts.
